message:
test: update TUI snapshot for focus and detail pane state changes

Regenerate e2e_journey_main_board_insights_graph_investigation snapshot
reflecting updated focus selection (item #3→#1) and detail pane field
layout changes from recent TUI improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
